entities.name: ENERGY
entities.description: Nutritional components including protein, starch, and fiber

entities.description: Characteristics related to the health-promoting properties of dryland cereals

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of malnutrition resulting from a lack of micronutrients

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Deficiency, excess, or imbalance in a person's intake of energy and/or nutrients

entities.name: DIABETES
entities.description: A lifestyle disease targeted by developed cereal products

entities.name: OBESITY
entities.description: A lifestyle disease targeted by developed cereal products

entities.name: ENERGY AND NUTRIENT DENSE FOOD
entities.description: Products developed to address hidden hunger and malnutrition

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL PROFILING
entities.description: The process of analyzing the nutritional content of cereals

entities.name: STARCH DIGESTION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which starch is broken down during digestion

entities.name: SLOWLY DIGESTIBLE STARCH
entities.description: A specific type of starch that is digested slowly

entities.name: PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating new products based on nutritional and functional traits

entities.name: COMMERCIALIZATION
entities.description: The process of bringing products to market through innovative business models
